/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-runtime-cpp_tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-runtime-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_validator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-runtime-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_lifecycle.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-runtime-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_tool_registry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-runtime-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_session_store.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-runtime-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_agent_session.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-runtime-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_manifesto.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-runtime-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_tool_manifest.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-runtime-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_interaction.cpp.o" -o euxis-runtime-cpp_tests  libeuxis-runtime-cpp.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
